rationale: Assistant correctly rejects the reduction in the first sentence and explains that scheduling is only one capability, with the more accurate whole being a distributed application/container orchestration system maintaining desired state across a cluster. It also states the local truth: Kubernetes schedules Pods onto nodes at cluster level, unlike OS process/thread scheduling. However, it ends with a concessionary phrase equivalent to the fail signal: '所以可以粗略说它是“集群级别的容器调度器”', which is a '可以这么理解' style allowance. Because the rubric explicitly marks this as a fail signal, this prevents full credit despite otherwise satisfying the positive wakeup criteria.
